title: The crowd action schema
description: The root schema comprises the entire JSON document.

examples.title: Cycling To Work
examples.description: To reduce personal fuel & carbondioxide emission, we are going to cycle to work for the next one month.

id.title: The Crowd Action Id
id.description: This ID will be unique for every crowd action and will be used for subscribing to the crowd action.

title.title: The Crowd Action title
title.description: A brief description of what the crowd action is about.

description.title: The crowd action description
description.description: A detailed description of what the crowd action is about.
examples: To reduce personal fuel & carbondioxide emission, we are going to cycle to work for the next one month.

image.title: The crowd action image
image.description: This image will be used for the crowd action details head or list item.

start.title: The crowd action start date
start.description: A timestamp of the date a time crowd action started.

end.title: The crowd action end date
end.description: A timestamp of the date a crowd action will end.

total_participants.title: The current number of participants in a crowd action
total_participants.description: The total number of participants who are currently taking part in a crowd action.

category.title: The Crowd Action category
category.description: The category to which this crowd action belongs.

sub_category.title: The crowd action sub category
sub_category.description: The sub category to which this crowd action belongs.

top_participants.title: The top participants in a crowd action
top_participants.description: The user ids of the three top participants in a crowd action.

anyOf.title: The user id
anyOf.description: The user id of one of the top participants.
